heading: Compensation of Deputy President pro tempore of Senate
label: 6112 Compensation of Deputy President pro tempore of Senate
text: Effective , the compensation of a Deputy President pro tempore of the Senate shall be at a rate equal to the rate of annual compensation of the President pro tempore and the Majority and Minority Leaders of the Senate.January 5, 1977
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 32a of this titleSection is from the Supplemental Appropriations Act, 1977.
